name: getsale-crm
description: AI CRM SaaS - Enterprise Microservices Platform

scripts.build:stack: npm run build -w shared/types -w shared/logger -w shared/events && npm run build -w shared/cache -w shared/queue -w shared/service-framework -w shared/telegram && npm run build -w services/gateway -w services/auth-service -w services/core-api -w services/messaging-api -w services/telegram-session-manager -w services/campaign-orchestrator -w services/campaign-worker -w services/automation-engine -w services/notification-hub -w services/analytics-worker -w services/user-service -w services/ai-service
